ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component or file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the component belongs to */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., file, folder) */,
  "component_path" TEXT /* Path of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was last updated */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was closed */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., code smell, bug) */,
  "rule" TEXT /* Rule or convention that was broken */,
  "component" TEXT /* Component or file where the issue was found */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., major, critical) */,
  "project" TEXT /* Project where the issue was found */,
  "start_line" INTEGER /* Starting line number of the issue */,
  "end_line" INTEGER /* Ending line number of the issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "effort" REAL /* Estimated effort required to fix the issue */,
  "debt" TEXT /* Technical debt associated with the issue */,
  "author" INTEGER /* Author who created the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "estimated_fix_time" REAL /* Estimated time required to fix the issue */,
  "actual_fix_time" REAL /* Actual time taken to fix the issue */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels associated with the issue */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* Developer or team assigned to fix the issue */,
  "parent_issue" INTEGER /* Parent issue (for nested issues) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project FOREIGN KEY ("project") REFERENCES projects ("project_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_component FOREIGN KEY ("component") REFERENCES components ("component_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_severity FOREIGN KEY ("severity") REFERENCES issue_severity ("severity_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES issue_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., updated, closed) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
